# Pika Resume - Full Documentation

> Pika Resume (https://pikaresume.com) is a free AI-powered resume builder that helps job seekers create professional, ATS-optimized resumes in minutes.

## Product Overview

Pika Resume combines AI content generation with professional resume templates to help users build job-ready resumes. The platform supports multiple resume creation flows and offers both AI-powered and human expert feedback.

## Features in Detail

### 1. AI Resume Builder (Free)
Create a resume from scratch using AI assistance.
- Smart content suggestions for each resume section
- AI-generated bullet points with strong action verbs and quantified achievements
- Section-by-section guidance: Personal Details, Professional Summary, Work Experience, Education, Skills, Projects, Certifications, Achievements
- Real-time preview as you build
- URL: https://pikaresume.com/dashboard?action=from_scratch

### 2. LinkedIn Profile Import (Free)
Import your LinkedIn profile to instantly populate your resume.
- One-click import from LinkedIn
- Automatic mapping of experience, education, and skills
- AI enhancement of imported content
- URL: https://pikaresume.com/dashboard

### 3. Upload and Enhance Existing Resume (Free)
Upload a PDF of your current resume and get an AI-enhanced version.
- PDF parsing with intelligent field extraction
- AI improves wording, structure, and formatting
- Preserves your original content while making it stronger
- Supports files up to 10 MB
- URL: https://pikaresume.com/dashboard?action=upload

### 4. Job Description Matching (Free)
Tailor your resume to match a specific job posting.
- Paste any job description URL or text
- AI analyzes the role requirements
- Resume content is automatically adjusted to highlight relevant experience and skills
- Keyword optimization for ATS compatibility
- URL: https://pikaresume.com/dashboard?action=tailored_jd

### 5. ATS-Optimized Resume Templates (Free)
Professional templates designed to pass Applicant Tracking Systems.
- Multiple modern, clean designs
- All templates are ATS-tested and recruiter-approved
- Customizable colors and layouts
- PDF export with proper formatting
- URL: https://pikaresume.com/templates

### 6. AI Resume Roast (Free)
Get brutally honest AI feedback on your resume.
- Upload your resume PDF
- Receive detailed, humorous but actionable feedback
- Identifies weak bullet points, missing metrics, formatting issues
- Provides specific improvement suggestions
- URL: https://pikaresume.com/roast

### 7. Expert Resume Review (Paid)
Get a manual, line-by-line review from industry professionals.
- Reviewers from Google, Microsoft, TikTok, Uber, Zepto, and 20+ top companies
- Every bullet point reviewed for clarity, impact, and relevance
- ATS compatibility verification
- Specific rewrite suggestions you can apply immediately
- Feedback personalized to your career level and target roles
- Delivered to your inbox within 3 business days
- URL: https://pikaresume.com/expert-review

## Target Audience

- **Freshers and Students**: First-time resume creators entering the job market
- **Experienced Professionals**: Updating resumes for career growth or new opportunities
- **Career Changers**: Repositioning experience for a different industry or role
- **Job Seekers**: Anyone actively applying who wants to maximize interview callbacks
- **International Professionals**: Creating resumes that meet global standards

## Technology

- Built with Next.js, React, and TypeScript
- AI powered by advanced language models for content generation
- Cloud-based with instant access from any browser
- Mobile-responsive for on-the-go editing

## Blog Topics

The Pika Resume blog covers:
- Resume writing tips and best practices
- ATS optimization strategies
- Career change advice
- Interview preparation
- Job search strategies
- AI tools for job seekers
- Industry-specific resume guidance
- Blog URL: https://pikaresume.com/blog

## Differentiators

1. **Truly Free**: Core features are free with generous download limits
2. **Multiple Creation Paths**: Build from scratch, import LinkedIn, upload existing, or match to job description
3. **AI + Human Review**: Both AI-powered instant feedback and expert human review available
4. **ATS-First Design**: Every template and suggestion is optimized for ATS compatibility
5. **Speed**: Create a professional resume in under 5 minutes
6. **Expert Network**: Reviews by professionals from Google, Microsoft, TikTok, and 20+ top companies

## Contact and Social

- Website: https://pikaresume.com
- Company: UIX Labs (https://uixlabs.co)
